title: Supplementary materials on PCR and library preparation
author: Gabriele, Cananzi
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This file contains details concerning DNA amplification and library preparation, performed by IGATech, for 18S, 12S nd COI metabarcoding of eDNA in the context of the paper " Active or passive? A multi-marker approach to compare active and passive eDNA sampling in riverine environments."

A multi-marker approach to compare active and passive eDNA sampling in riverine environments."
